recommendations.title: The Unforgivable
recommendations.overview: A woman is released from prison after serving a sentence for a violent crime and re-enters a society that refuses to forgive her past.

recommendations.title: Here Alone
recommendations.overview: A woman struggles to survive on her own in the wake of a mysterious epidemic, which has decimated society and forced her deep into the unforgiving wild.

recommendations.title: Lake Bodom
recommendations.overview: Four friends are spending the night at Lake Bodom, where unsolved murders took place many years ago. The young men are determined to venture into the dense forest to solve the mystery.

recommendations.title: Bronson
recommendations.overview: A young man who was sentenced to 7 years in prison for robbing a post office ends up spending 30 years in solitary confinement. During this time, his own personality is supplanted by his alter ego, Charles Bronson.

recommendations.title: Flipped
recommendations.overview: When Juli meets Bryce in the second grade, she knows it's true love. After spending six years trying to convince Bryce the same, she's ready to give up - until he starts to reconsider.

recommendations.title: The Count of Monte Cristo
recommendations.overview: Edmond Dantés's life and plans to marry the beautiful Mercedes are shattered when his best friend, Fernand, deceives him. After spending 13 miserable years in prison, Dantés escapes with the help of a fellow inmate and plots his revenge, cleverly ins

recommendations.title: Dirty Dancing
recommendations.overview: Spending the summer at a Catskills resort with her family, Frances "Baby" Houseman falls in love with the camp's dance instructor, Johnny Castle, and nothing is ever the same for anyone in the Houseman family.

recommendations.title: The Kite Runner
recommendations.overview: After spending years in California, Amir returns to his homeland in Afghanistan to help his old friend Hassan, whose son is in trouble.

recommendations.title: Emmanuelle: Queen of Sados
recommendations.overview: A woman struggles to keep her stepdaughter from harms way after she hires an assassin to kill her husband, but the hitman turns and blackmails her for the crime.

recommendations.title: Down by Love
recommendations.overview: A man, a woman. A prison director, his inmate. An impossible love, a true story.
